reason: The image shows a group of men in suits, seemingly discussing financial documents. While the setting (tropical location) could potentially be relevant to the Paradise Papers topic, the presence of smartphones, a laptop, sunglasses and the overall modern appearance of the clothing and documents make it anachronistic and unsuitable for representing the 2017 event in a historically accurate manner. The Appleby documents are also anachronistic; they are not meant to be that visible. The architecture is too modern.
